sections.paragraph:
verb לפצות (>>לִפְצוֹת)

to open (one's mouth); say, speak; (Archaic) deliver, rescue, save

verb לפצות (>>לְפַצּוֹת)

recompense, compensate

verb להיפצות

be opened

verb לפצות (>>פיצה)

to compensate, reward; reimburse, pay back

verb פוצה

be compensated, rewarded; reimbursed

verb להפיץ

to spread, distribute; scatter; publish

verb הופץ

be spread; distributed; scattered; published

verb לפצות

to compensate, reward; reimburse, pay back
